name: setChatStickerSet
description: Use this method to set a new group sticker set for a supergroup. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate administrator rights. Use the field can_set_sticker_set optionally returned in getChat requests to check if the bot can use this method

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target supergroup in the format @username

parameters.name: sticker_set_name
parameters.description: Name of the sticker set to be set as the group sticker set
